prompt: Create a vertical anime-style light novel or illustration collection cover set on a moonlit beach at night, dominated by deep cobalt and navy blue tones. At the top, place the large elegant cursive title Moonlight Blue in glowing pale blue-white calligraphy, with long sweeping flourishes, and add the small lowercase author name yurara on the upper left beneath the title. In the upper right sky, include a bright crescent moon surrounded by tiny stars and subtle atmospheric glow. The central subject is a teenage anime girl standing waist-up on the shoreline, reaching one hand toward the viewer in a dramatic invitation pose; her long silvery pale blue hair is windswept in many fine strands across the image, catching moonlight. Her face is covered by a centered opaque muted blue-gray square censor block, hiding the facial features. She wears a white short-sleeved sailor school uniform with a light blue collar and a soft gold ribbon bow, plus a dark skirt visible at the bottom. Behind her, render dark rolling ocean waves, wet sand, and a shimmering path of moonlight reflected on the water. Use soft painterly anime rendering, luminous rim lighting, cinematic composition, delicate hair detail, romantic melancholy mood, and high-resolution book-cover typography.
